name: Southwestern Chicken Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces black beans, canned and rinsed
8 ounces shredded lowfat Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Chop the onion in a food processor with the metal blade.
3. Add the tomatoes with their juice, picante sauce, and taco seasoning mix; pulse until the tomatoes are small pieces (about 3-4 pulses).
4. Remove the mixture to a medium bowl and stir in the black beans.
5. In a small bowl, mix the eggs with the ricotta cheese; set aside.
6. Spread 1 cup of the bean sauce over the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch casserole dish coated with nonstick cooking spray.
7. Top with 5 noodles, overlapping slightly.
8. Sprinkle with half the chicken, half the chilies, and 2 more cups of the sauce.
9. Spoon out the ricotta cheese mixture and spread it lightly over the layers.
10. Top with half the shredded cheese, 5 more remaining noodles, and the remaining chicken, chilies, sauce, and cheese.
11. Bake uncovered for 40 minutes, or until the noodles are tender when pierced with a sharp knife. Cool at least 20 minutes before serving.
